_note: Unified content layer for the entire Pelimotion site. Edit via admin/index.html or directly here.

portfolio.heroRelease: Visual systems built for those who set the pace, not just follow it.
portfolio.footerQuote1: Visual systems built for those who set the pace, not just follow it.
portfolio.footerQuote2: Systemize the motion, elevate the branding.

BC MAPPING FESTIVAL.description: Visual identity and motion system for BC Mapping Festival — a large-scale projection mapping event celebrating art, light, and urban architecture.
BC MAPPING FESTIVAL.release: A full motion branding system developed for one of the south's largest projection mapping festivals. Every asset was engineered to feel kinetic in both digital and outdoor contexts.

EQI.description: Behind the scenes content production for EQI Investimentos' exclusive activation at Cirque du Soleil.
EQI.release: Exclusive making-of content produced for EQI's high-end brand activation at Cirque du Soleil. Captures the intersection of luxury finance and world-class live performance.

FAST SHIPPING.description: Living rebranding concept — a dynamic visual identity system that breathes, evolves, and adapts across digital touchpoints.
FAST SHIPPING.release: A concept-driven rebranding exploration for Fast Shipping, translating the brand's core promise of speed and reliability into a living, modular motion identity.

FUNKY ROOM.description: Full creative direction and motion branding for Funky Room, a recurring underground party series. Six editions of visual identity, campaign material, and brand animation.
FUNKY ROOM.release: Six editions. One consistent visual language that grows bolder with each release. Funky Room's motion identity was built to live on every screen — from stories to street panels.

FURB.description: Broadcast and institutional campaign work for FURB university — motion design for TV, digital, and event formats including accessible LIBRAS versions.
FURB.release: A comprehensive broadcast campaign for FURB, designed to reach across channels — from primetime TV to digital platforms — while maintaining full LIBRAS accessibility compliance.

HEO.description: Complete rebranding motion package for HEO — logo animation, visual system, and brand guidelines in motion.
HEO.release: A precise, minimal logo reveal and brand motion system built for HEO's identity relaunch. Clean execution, maximum brand recall.

LSLA.description: Motion branding, manifesto films, and campaign material for Isla — a beachside venue blending gastronomy, nightlife, and coastal aesthetics.
LSLA.release: From campaign posts to AI-generated food content and cinematic manifesto films, this project spans the full creative spectrum of Isla's coastal brand universe.

NEXTRON.description: Logo animation and brand signature update for Nextron — clean, technical motion design for a tech brand.
NEXTRON.release: A refined brand signature update for Nextron, expressing precision and forward motion through minimal animation language.

PIANISSIMO.description: Stage visuals and real-time visualizers for Pianissimo — ambient, generative motion for live performance environments.
PIANISSIMO.release: Generative stage visuals designed to breathe with the music. Built for live performance, Pianissimo's visualizers shift between ambient and reactive modes in real time.

PLAYA.description: Comprehensive motion branding for Playa Beach Club — manifesto films, weekly campaigns, event promos, and seasonal visual identity across 40+ deliverables.
PLAYA.release: An ongoing creative partnership with Playa Beach Club — building a cohesive visual language across every touchpoint, from high-concept manifesto films to weekly social activations.

RIO CARNAVAL.description: App visualizer and release film for Rio Carnaval — capturing the kinetic energy of Brazil's biggest cultural event through motion design.
RIO CARNAVAL.release: Two films for the Rio Carnaval app launch — one a full release film, one a kinetic visualizer. Both designed to capture the rhythm and spectacle of the world's greatest carnival.

SUZANO.description: Institutional and event motion design for Suzano — including innovation center presentations, award ceremonies, and internal culture films.
SUZANO.release: A series of institutional pieces for Suzano spanning innovation, culture, and recognition — designed to communicate impact at scale across digital and event environments.

WOLFGARTEN.description: Motion branding and signature animation for Wolfgarten — a premium European outdoor living brand entering the Brazilian market.
WOLFGARTEN.release: Brand motion assets for Wolfgarten's Brazilian launch — precise, premium, and built to communicate quality craftsmanship through fluid, confident animation.

PREFEITURA TIMBÓ.description: Institutional motion campaign for Prefeitura de Timbó — government communication designed with clarity and civic purpose.
PREFEITURA TIMBÓ.release: Public sector motion design for Prefeitura de Timbó, balancing institutional clarity with modern visual language to reach the full breadth of the community.

Media Kit.description: Brand assets in motion — color palettes, patterns, and transitions for digital and print application.

Motion Campaign.description: Campaign-ready deliverables — social media, OOH, digital ad, and event-specific motion pieces.

FUNKY 6 - FUNKED UP.description: Edition 06 — Funked Up. A rawer, grittier take on the Funky Room identity with conceptual slogans and BTS content.

FUNKY ROOM 1.description: Edition 01 — The original. First Room, After Party, and the birth of the visual language.

FUNKY ROOM 2.description: Edition 02 — Drop culture meets nightlife. Ticket reveals, headline animations, and urgency-driven promos.

FUNKY ROOM 3.description: Edition 03 — Full social media campaign. Multi-format content for feed, stories, and OOH.

FUNKY ROOM 4.description: Edition 04 — Blue Edition. Turntable visuals, headline reveals, and artist-specific content.

FUNKY ROOM 5.description: Edition 05 — Evolved social media system with refined grid and content hierarchy.

Broadcast Campaign - FURB.description: TV-ready spots and institutional films — multi-format broadcast campaign with LIBRAS accessibility.

OOH Campaign - ETEVI.description: Event-specific campaign for ETEVI — multi-resolution adaptations for screens, social, and outdoor.

MANIFESTO.description: Brand manifesto and concept films — high-production narrative pieces that define the brand's soul.

IA Genenerated.description: AI-assisted visual explorations — experimental food and lifestyle content generated with creative AI tools.

curriculum.name: Felipe Conceição
curriculum.title: Creative Director, motion branding and artistic direction.
curriculum.subtitle: Eight years translating brand strategy into rhythm, light and image — from generative pipelines to projection mapping.
curriculum.profileParagraph1: I work where strategy meets motion. Over eight years I've built visual systems for global brands across automotive, finance and culture — designing how a brand moves, not only how it looks.
curriculum.profileParagraph2: My background as a musician shapes everything: pacing, weight, silence. Today I lead Pelimotion Hub, where we develop AI-integrated motion pipelines and direct immersive experiences — combining motion design with light and projection for theater and live performances.

items: Systems lead for modular motion pipelines (digital/retail).
Brand strategy alignment for high-ticket positioning.
Generative motion merging fine art with digital media.
CGI/Motion content for BMW, Subaru, Hyundai, Motul, EQI.
Owned post-production pipeline for aesthetic excellence.
Broadcast / Digital Signage assets for financial sectors.
Strategic brands: Suzano, O Boticário, Colcci.
